scripts.build: bun run build:runtime && bun run build:adapters
scripts.build:runtime: bun run --filter @negotium/core build && bun run --filter @negotium/mcp-host build && bun run --filter @negotium/mcp build && bun run --filter @negotium/module-cron build && bun run --filter @negotium/adapter-sdk build && bun run --filter @negotium/node build
scripts.build:adapters: bun run --filter @negotium/adapter-terminal build && bun run --filter @negotium/adapter-telegram build && bun run --filter @negotium/adapter-otium build && bun run --filter @negotium/cli build && bun run --filter negotium build
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run build
